<!-- ═══ KUERRE VISUAL OVERRIDE — tema claro (default) + modo nocturno, toggle por navegador ═══ -->
<style>
/* ── ACENTOS KUERRE (ambos temas) ── */
:root{--gold:#9060b8;--gold2:#a878cc;}
#sidebar-logo-img{display:none;}
.sidebar-logo-text{font-size:0;color:transparent;}
.sidebar-logo-text span{display:none;}
.sidebar-logo-text::before{content:'KUERRE';display:block;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9060b8;}
.nav-section-label{color:rgba(144,96,184,.55);}
.btn-add{color:#fff;}
.login-btn{color:#fff;}
.cnt-tab.active,.cnt-subtab.active{color:#fff;}
.db-check{color:#fff;}
#theme-toggle-btn{font-size:14px;line-height:1;}

/* ── TEMA CLARO (default via data-theme="light") ── */
:root[data-theme="light"] {
  --black:#ffffff; --black2:#f6f6f8; --black3:#ffffff; --black4:#f5f1fa;
  --cyan:#7b4fff; --violet:#7b4fff; --gold:#9060b8; --gold2:#7a4aa0;
  --white:#111111; --gray:rgba(0,0,0,.45); --gray2:rgba(0,0,0,.6);
  --green:#0e9f4e; --red:#cc4444; --orange:#d97706;
  --card:#ebebef; --border:rgba(0,0,0,.08); --bg:#f6f6f8;
}
[data-theme="light"] body{
  background:#f6f6f8;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 55% at 15% 15%, rgba(192,144,224,.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 45% at 85% 80%, rgba(192,144,224,.14) 0%, transparent 60%);
  background-attachment:fixed;
}
/* LOGIN */
[data-theme="light"] #login-screen{background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, rgba(144,96,184,.12) 0%, transparent 70%), #f6f6f8;}
[data-theme="light"] .login-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.85);border:1px solid rgba(144,96,184,.2);border-radius:20px;backdrop-filter:blur(24px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.10);}
[data-theme="light"] .login-input{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);border-radius:8px;}
[data-theme="light"] .login-btn{border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#9060b8,#c090e0);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(192,144,224,.35);}
[data-theme="light"] .login-btn:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a4aa0,#b07ad0);}
/* SIDEBAR */
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar{background:#ebebef;border-right:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar-logo{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar-item:hover{color:#111;background:rgba(144,96,184,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar-item.active{color:#9060b8;background:rgba(144,96,184,.10);}
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar-item.active svg{opacity:1;}
[data-theme="light"] .sidebar-footer{border-top:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .ct-tipo-btn{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);}
[data-theme="light"] .ct-tipo-btn.active{background:rgba(144,96,184,.06);}
/* TOOLTIPS */
[data-theme="light"] .tip{background:rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
/* TOPBAR / MAIN */
[data-theme="light"] .topbar-admin{background:rgba(246,246,248,.94);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);}
[data-theme="light"] .view-site-btn{border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12);border-radius:6px;}
[data-theme="light"] .view-site-btn:hover{border-color:#9060b8;color:#9060b8;}
/* CARDS */
[data-theme="light"] .stat-card{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .stat-card:hover{border-color:rgba(144,96,184,.3);background:#ebebef;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(144,96,184,.12);}
[data-theme="light"] .stat-card-icon{background:rgba(144,96,184,.10);}
/* BOTONES */
[data-theme="light"] .btn-add{background:#9060b8;}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-add:hover{background:#7a4aa0;}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-sec{background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);color:rgba(0,0,0,.55);border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-sec:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.1);color:#111;}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-edit{background:rgba(123,79,255,.08);border-color:rgba(123,79,255,.25);}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-pub{background:rgba(14,159,78,.08);border-color:rgba(14,159,78,.25);}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-pub:hover{color:#fff;}
[data-theme="light"] .btn-danger{background:rgba(204,68,68,.08);border-color:rgba(204,68,68,.25);}
/* TABS */
[data-theme="light"] .tabs{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
/* TABLA */
[data-theme="light"] th{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
[data-theme="light"] td{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.05);}
[data-theme="light"] tr:hover td{background:rgba(144,96,184,.03);}
[data-theme="light"] .tag-c{background:rgba(144,96,184,.12);}
[data-theme="light"] .tag-r{background:rgba(123,79,255,.10);}
[data-theme="light"] .tag-draft{background:rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
/* MODAL */
[data-theme="light"] .modal-bg{background:rgba(30,15,50,.35);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
[data-theme="light"] .modal{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.18);}
[data-theme="light"] .modal-header{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .modal-footer{border-top:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
/* FORMS */
[data-theme="light"] .form-input,[data-theme="light"] .form-textarea,[data-theme="light"] .form-select{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);}
[data-theme="light"] .form-input::placeholder,[data-theme="light"] .form-textarea::placeholder{color:rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
/* UPLOAD / GRILLAS */
[data-theme="light"] .img-upload{border:1px dashed rgba(0,0,0,.18);}
[data-theme="light"] .db-item{background:#f0ecf5;}
[data-theme="light"] .db-item:hover{border-color:rgba(144,96,184,.4);}
[data-theme="light"] .portfolio-admin-item{background:#f0ecf5;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
/* MENSAJES */
[data-theme="light"] .msg-card{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:12px;}
[data-theme="light"] .msg-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,0,0,.15);}
[data-theme="light"] .msg-wa:hover{color:#fff;}
/* SETTINGS */
[data-theme="light"] .settings-section{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:12px;}
/* ANALYTICS */
[data-theme="light"] .chart-card{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:12px;}
/* TOAST */
[data-theme="light"] #toast{background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(14,159,78,.35);border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);}
[data-theme="light"] #toast.error{border-color:rgba(204,68,68,.35);}
/* CONTENT TABS / CARDS */
[data-theme="light"] .cnt-tab.active,[data-theme="light"] .cnt-subtab.active{background:#9060b8;}
[data-theme="light"] .cnt-svc-card,[data-theme="light"] .cnt-pkg-card{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:12px;}
/* INVITES */
[data-theme="light"] .inv-card{background:#ebebef;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-radius:12px;}
[data-theme="light"] .inv-card-badge{background:rgba(144,96,184,.12);}
[data-theme="light"] .inv-modal-section{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
[data-theme="light"] .inv-media-preview{border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
[data-theme="light"] .inv-gsheet-code{background:#f5f1fa;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
</style>
<script>
// Tema por navegador: kuerre_theme vive SOLO en localStorage (no está en CF_SYNC_KEYS, no sincroniza a la nube)
(function(){
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', localStorage.getItem('kuerre_theme') || 'light');
  window.toggleKuerreTheme = function(){
    var next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    localStorage.setItem('kuerre_theme', next);
    var b = document.getElementById('theme-toggle-btn');
    if (b) b.textContent = next === 'dark' ? '☀' : '🌙';
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    var actions = document.querySelector('.topbar-actions');
    if (!actions) return;
    var b = document.createElement('button');
    b.id = 'theme-toggle-btn';
    b.className = 'view-site-btn';
    b.title = 'Modo claro / oscuro';
    b.textContent = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? '☀' : '🌙';
    b.onclick = window.toggleKuerreTheme;
    actions.insertBefore(b, actions.firstChild);
  });
})();
</script>
<!-- ═══ / KUERRE VISUAL OVERRIDE ═══ -->

async function initContratosPage() {
